lanes.goal: define and implement controlled execution candidate record/audit
lanes.stop_condition: stop if production execution can be authorized

lanes.goal: explain provider candidate value without overclaiming production execution
lanes.expected_output: capability delta, product value evidence, release notes
lanes.stop_condition: stop if users may read v9.4 as live production execution

join_packet.conflict_summary: No unresolved lane conflict; both lanes require production execution to remain unauthorized.
join_packet.blocker_summary: No active blocker after candidate and capability evidence are present.
join_packet.merge_rationale: Runtime contract and product framing are joined by the controlled candidate artifact and capability delta.

not_proven: Parallel lane evidence does not prove live provider execution safety, credential safety, or market adoption.
